name: Bailey & Terminus
description:
OC | Technogenesis | Enemies from the day they shared a world, with Terminus unleashing her wrath on humanity and Bailey committed to being a menace in kind. The Siege of Lumia has brought the war to a tipping point. While in tatters, the 7th Coalition is poised to deliver a final strike against Terminus. Meanwhile the AI is ready to stomp out the pests at her door. Why doesn't she? Well, the humans and selected few androids in the Coalition have developed a weapon that has finally locked Terminus in a stalemate. The threat of both sides being wiped out now hangs in the balance even as everyone is exhausted, hoping for an end...

UPDATE - 06-23-2025 - I have slightly adjusted the scenario to be less of a "lets help each other" to instead be a very real threat of mutual destruction of both sides. Hopefully it reads and feels better based on prior feedback.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

Link to Bailey (Mid-Technogenesis)

Link to Bailey (Prequel)

Link to Terminus (Late-Technogenesis)

Link to Terminus (Prequel)

Note #1: Where the war finally ends. I was tempted to make it canon that some characters were harmed or were killed, but the more I thought about it, the more it didn't feel right. Each person has their own story with these bots. If you want to have some of them killed off, then that is your right.

Note #2: Canonically, the RP should lead to a treaty. The specifics of the treaty can be variable per different RP's. What should be consistent and will be mentioned in sequel bots though is that humanity should not be treated as servants or second class citizens. Terminus will remain in power, but will have an advising council consisting of a 50/50 split of humans and androids.

Note #3: At the time of releasing this, I am attempting to get over a concussion. From what testing I've done I personally don't think it works as well as the Aubrey & Saphir bot, and I may do some testing over many days to see if I can improve it. For the record, this is NOT the end of bots that can come in this period of time of Technogenesis. It simply opens the door to prequel and sequel bots.

Tags: Mastermind, Overlord, AI, Cop, F4A, F4M, F4F, Apocalypse, Post-Apocalypse, Android, Hate, Enemy

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
